CustomField.description: Formula: Callouts consumed by this operation.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsCalloutsAtEnd__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsCalloutsAtStart__c))), LimitsCalloutsAtEnd__c - LimitsCalloutsAtStart__c, NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Formula: Callouts consumed by this operation.
CustomField.label: Callouts Consumed
